dataset_path: /Volumes/dockcase2tb/database_all/股票数据/基础数据/北交所新旧代码对照
notes: Six BSE (北交所) new-code (920***) constituents projected into StockBasicRecord shape. Each row's ts_code is the bse_mapping.n_code (new 920 series after 2020 renumbering). symbol, name, cnspell come from stock_basic; fullname from stock_company; exchange pinned to BSE (entity-registry init._exchange_from_ts_code derives it identically from the .BJ suffix); market='北交所'; list_status='L' (listed); list_date from bse_mapping.list_date; is_hs=null (BSE stocks are not in the HSGT universe, so is_hs MUST NOT be set to H or S here). The fixture proves entity-registry correctly handles the .BJ → BSE exchange mapping, which is a zero-tolerance invariant for the BSE universe.
